nasb.text: I am He who testifies about Myself, and the Father who sent Me testifies about Me.”

esv.text: I am the one who bears witness about myself, and the Father who sent me bears witness about me.”

cnv.text: 我為自己作證，差我來的父也為我作證。”

ccb.text: 我是自己为自己做见证，差我来的父也为我做见证。”

csbs.text: 我为自己做见证，派我来的父也为我做见证。”
